title: Immortality+
description: A Fabric server-side mod that lets you toggle persistent death protection per-player, with chat feedback, player listing, and save/load across restarts
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/867abf93075e2ac36db7877dd1a9ec384cc50ad8.png)
# About
**Immortality+** is a Fabric server-side mod that adds persistent player immortality to your Minecraft server. Toggle death protection per-player using simple commands, with full persistence across server restarts.
## Features
- Toggle immortality on any player with a single **`/immortal`** command, with clear chat feedback on every use.
- List all currently immortal players at a glance with **`/immortallist`**.
- Immortal players are **saved across server restarts**, no need to re-toggle after reloading.
- Fully respects **Totem of Undying**, the totem pops first before immortality kicks in.
- Lightweight and **server-side only**, no client installation required.
- Compatible with **Minecraft 1.21.11 (Fabric)**.
## Installation
1. Download the most recent version compatible with your Fabric installation.
2. Drop it into your server's `mods/` folder.
3. Requires **Fabric API**.
